hero.title: Turn every rider into a premium shareable Yamaha story.
hero.description: A fast, campaign-ready personality flow that transforms rider preferences into a branded, emotionally expressive image built for social sharing and awareness.
highlights: Up to 3 reference photos for stronger face preservation
Instant caption, download, and social share
hero.viralityDescription: The result page is optimized for rider excitement, repeat generation, and social storytelling that expands Yamaha brand visibility.

settings.poseDirection: Full-body vertical portrait of the rider standing beside or lightly leaning on the motorcycle, one foot grounded, stylish confident body language, premium biker fashion pose, face clearly visible, head uncovered, no helmet on the head.
settings.cameraFrame: Vertical 4:5 campaign framing, full head visible, full feet visible, entire rider visible from head to toe, bike fully visible, no cropped head, no cropped shoes, premium shallow depth of field.
poseVariants: The rider is standing beside the motorcycle with a relaxed editorial pose and both feet fully visible.
The rider is lightly leaning on the motorcycle with one hand resting on the seat and a confident campaign pose.
The rider is standing next to the motorcycle with one leg slightly crossed, stylish street-fashion biker posture.
The rider is posing beside the motorcycle with strong premium body language and full head-to-toe framing.
The rider is standing beside the motorcycle with a clean fashion-commercial pose, face clearly visible and shoes fully visible.
settings.wardrobeDirection: The rider is wearing premium biker streetwear: fitted jeans, a real leather jacket, clean boots or sneakers, and a cool modern Yamaha lifestyle look.
settings.realismDirection: Ultra photorealistic commercial motorcycle photography. Real Yamaha design language, real motorcycle proportions, real materials, realistic wheels, brakes, fairings, lighting, shadows, and reflections. No illustration, no anime, no cartoon, no CGI look, no plastic-looking surfaces, no stylized rendering.

behaviorQuestion.title: Your friend is late by 20 minutes. What do you do?
behaviorQuestion.description: This quick behavior cue helps define your emotional tone and friendship dynamic inside the final composition.

options.label: Leave
options.description: Bold and independent. Your time matters.
options.socialDynamicFriend: two close friends with playful respect for each other's independence
options.socialDynamicSolo: a self-assured rider owning the road with complete independence

options.label: Stay
options.description: Calm and loyal. You protect the bond.
options.socialDynamicFriend: two close friends with a deeply supportive, easygoing connection
options.socialDynamicSolo: a calm rider with a grounded, trustworthy presence

options.label: Wait & scold
options.description: Expressive and emotional. You care, loudly.
options.socialDynamicFriend: two close friends with teasing chemistry and visible affection
options.socialDynamicSolo: an expressive rider with bold body language and emotional charisma
